meaning: adj.有刺的,具侧刺毛的,(话语)尖刻的,尖锐的,讽刺的
examples: His jacket had been torn to shreds by the barbed wire.
His property is fenced with barbed wire.
The factory was surrounded by barbed wire.
Pieces on display include his barbed wire and graffiti-printed fabrics used in fresh and stylish ways.
It was a house with high walls, barbed wires and no Internet or telephone connection.
